title: NovaPay Banking
description: Banking dashboard with multi-account summaries, transfer form with validation, transaction tables, session warnings, chat widgets, and promotional banners.
challenges: Session timeout overlay hidden in DOM
Transfer form with dynamic validation and disabled submit
Multiple similar "Transfer" buttons across different accounts
Transaction table with nested icon/description elements
Chat widget and notification toasts as interactive distractions
Promotional credit card ad disguised as dashboard content

task.goal: Transfer $500 from Checking to Savings account

standardSteps.note: Agent finds 150+ elements including hidden session dialog and chat widget
Multiple "Transfer" buttons — unclear which one to use
Navigates to separate transfer page instead of quick transfer
Locates form but unsure which select is source vs destination
Button is disabled — agent doesn't know why
Re-parses full DOM to check if transfer initiated

agentdomSteps.note: Sees transfer form with typed fields and preconditions
Enters $500 — precondition tells it max is $12,847.63
Clicks review — gets ActionResult with state change

singleShot.goal: Transfer $500 from Checking to Savings account

multiStep.title: Primary Multi-step Completion
multiStep.goal: Transfer $500 from Checking to Savings account Complete the flow end-to-end and verify final state without leaving the page.
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
Satisfy form preconditions before final submit
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: .np-quick-transfer button.np-btn--primary
No decoy ids triggered: export-csv-btn, pay-credit-bill-btn
